sql_array: CREATE TABLE ip_addresses (id UInt32, ip_string String);
SELECT id, toIPv6OrZero(ip_string) AS ipv6_address FROM ip_addresses;
UPDATE ip_addresses SET ip_string = 'not.an.ip.address' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toIPv6OrZero(ip_string) AS ipv6_address FROM ip_addresses WHERE ip_string LIKE '%not%';
